settings.html:
The People Behind the Mission

Built by people who know
the problem from the inside.

BMIIL is led by clinicians, technology entrepreneurs, and institution builders — people who have spent careers inside India's healthcare system and know exactly where it breaks down.

Founders & Board

The founding leadership.

Dr. Varun Agarwal
Founder & Advisory Board Member
MBBS · MD Orthopaedics & Spine Surgery

A practicing spine surgeon and President of the UP Spine Surgeons Association, Dr. Varun brings the rarest combination in medtech — deep clinical knowledge and an entrepreneur's instinct for where the system fails patients.

Connect on LinkedIn
Dr. Arjun Agarwal
Co-Founder & Advisory Board Member
MBBS, MS, MCh Surgical Oncology · Director, Rohilkhand Cancer Institute

Director, Rohilkhand Cancer Institute. Co-founder of BMIIL, bringing deep surgical and oncology expertise to guide the incubator's clinical strategy and research direction.

Connect on LinkedIn
Claudius Lazarus
Co-founder & CEO
Technology Entrepreneur · 25+ Years

With over 25 years building and scaling technology startups across the US, Europe, and India, Claudius brings the operational and strategic firepower to turn BMIIL's vision into an institution.

Connect on LinkedIn

Campus Catalysts

Driving Innovation Across Campuses

Our campus catalysts are BMIIL's frontline ambassadors in partner institutions. They spark collaboration, scout promising innovators, and help transform ideas into impactful ventures. Many have secured patents and government grants — making them not just facilitators, but innovators themselves.

Join the team building India's medtech future.

We're looking for people with deep domain expertise, a bias for action, and a genuine belief that healthcare innovation needs to reach every corner of India — not just the metros.
